---
title: "Part 7: Iterative Solvers and Memory Strategy"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

[Back to regularizeNd series home](index.qmd)

[Previous: Part 6](part-06-constraints-and-mappings.qmd)

This part focuses on large problems where direct methods can fail due to memory or factorization issues.

## Practical Goal

- Use iterative solver options for very large systems.
- Understand preconditioning role in convergence behavior.
- Set practical tolerance and iteration limits.

## Example Anchor

Primary script: `regularizeNd/Examples/exampleIterativeSolver.m`

## Suggested Walkthrough

1. Reproduce a large-dimensional case.
2. Compare iterative options and stopping behavior.
3. Track memory use and runtime.
4. Pick settings that are reliable for your problem class.

## Attribution

This educational progression is inspired by Peter Goldstein's regularization articles and related prior tools.

## Next

[Part 8: Lineage and Practical Migration Notes](part-08-lineage-and-practical-migration-notes.qmd)
